steps.title: Apply the area scale factor rule
steps.content: We need to convert area from square yards to square miles. Since 1 mile = 1,760 yards, we square this scale factor for area: 1 square mile = $(1,760)^2$ = 3,097,600 square yards.

steps.title: Divide to convert the park's area
steps.content:
The park's area in square miles is:
$$11,863,808 \div 3,097,600 = 3.83 \text{ square miles}$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
